stem: A linear function f models the balance, in dollars, of a bank account x months after an initial deposit. The graph of y = f(x) in the xy-plane passes through the points (0, 25), (5, 40), and (10, 55). What is the value of f(0)?
rationale: From the graph, the point (0, 25) lies on the line, so f(0) = 25 dollars.
